text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, I walk Mayano Top Gun back to
her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I had sooo much fun on our date today,
Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I know! You should come up and see my room!
We can watch TV and drink tea—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, dear. As dorm leader, how am I supposed to
look past that?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Darn it! Caught by Dad...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, like in the dramas—when a couple runs
into the girl's dad at her house!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha. So I'm the dad, huh? Well, it's true I do
function somewhat like a parent as dorm leader.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Right! Let me introduce you! Dad, this is my
special someone. ☆

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh? My daughter's special someone, huh? Is that
so?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Awww! ☆ You're blushing, Trainer! How cute!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... That's enough messing around for now. I
can see the two of you have a good relationship.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That must be why you've been so energetic
recently.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Well, the two of us are promised to each
other! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, you're supposed to agree with me,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, I see. You're just as Mayano described.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I hope you continue watching over her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Hm, I do sound quite a bit like a father, don't I?
Haha.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll be taking my leave now. It's almost time for
dinner, Mayano. Come and join me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay! But first...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You got the dorm dad's approval, Trainer! This is
the perfect practice for the real thing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'll be off! See ya tomorrow! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...At any rate, it seems Mayano Top Gun and I are
both motivated to keep up the hard work.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What did you just say?! You're lying! What does
th—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I see, I see. So you're something of a player?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: N-no way... Was I just some side fling?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? Kidding?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! That's right. Anyway, enough teasing
for now.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You were teasing me?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! You're both terrible! I seriously
thought I was gonna cry!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I won't forgive you, no matter what you
say!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My my, what a pure, true love. I cannot bring
myself to cause any more discord here...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I just remembered! Mayano, did you know
they're holding a cake fair at the cafeteria right
now?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know. I wanted to go, but I couldn't get
any tickets...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, I have exactly two extra tickets in my room.
How about the two of you make up over a cup of
tea?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! Please, please! I wanna go with Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Perfect. They're on the desk right by the door to
my room. Why don't you go get them?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Got it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Phew. Seems like everything worked out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's my pleasure. The truth is, I've been meaning
to thank you for a while now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Mayano is very curious... I couldn't help but feel a
bit concerned for her.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Hurry, before the cafeteria closes!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Heh. Have fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, the two of us make up and enjoy
ourselves over some tea and cake.
